catalysts.thesis: MannKind has an upcoming PDUFA date on May 29, 2026, for Afrezza's pediatric label expansion. The stock offers a compelling pre-catalyst run-up opportunity.
catalysts.catalyst_details: The FDA has a PDUFA target action date of May 29, 2026, for the sBLA of Afrezza (inhaled insulin) to treat children and adolescents (aged 4-17) with type 1 or 2 diabetes.
catalysts.absorption_status: The catalyst remains largely unpriced as market attention is heavily skewed toward mega-cap tech earnings.
catalysts.prediction_market: Historical sBLA pediatric success rates imply a 75-80% probability of approval.
catalysts.recency_proof: FDA Monthly Preview: Key May Decisions to Watch [1.1.2]
catalysts.risk: FDA CRL (Complete Response Letter) or unexpected delay in approval.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Options implied volatility remains relatively muted for a near-term regulatory biotech catalyst, suggesting the market is asleep at the wheel.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Positive buzz forming among biotech analysts on X, but mainstream retail is unaware.

catalysts.thesis: Agilysys just reported earnings on May 18, 2026, setting up a classic Post-Earnings Announcement Drift (PEAD) as the stock has not yet spiked out of range.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Q4 FY2026 Earnings were released pre-market on May 18, 2026, showing continued resilient demand for its hospitality software solutions.
catalysts.absorption_status: Earnings just dropped pre-market, and the stock is up only ~2.47%. Institutional algorithms have not yet fully priced in the fundamental strength.
catalysts.prediction_market: Post-earnings momentum models suggest a 70% chance of a multi-week upward drift.
catalysts.risk: Broader macroeconomic headwinds or a software sector sell-off could drag the stock down despite strong individual performance.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: The stock is currently up less than 3% today, failing to trigger the 8% overbought rule, indicating the earnings beat is not fully digested.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Quiet so far; mostly algorithmic mentions of the earnings release with little retail hype.
